TeamTalk 5 .NET DLL Version 5.19A

Topics
Here is a list of all topics with brief descriptions:
 Client InitializationThis section explains how to instantiate a new client instance and query its current state
 Sound Capture and PlaybackThis section explains how to record and playback audio in the client instance
 Video Capture and Image DisplayThis section explains how to detect and configure video capture devices
 Audio and Video CodecsThis section explains how to configure audio and video codecs
 Desktop SharingThis section explains how to use the desktop sharing feature where users can share their desktop applications
 Stream Media FilesGet or query the raw RGB32 bitmap data of a user's video frame
 Client Event HandlingThis section explains how to handle events generated by the client instance
 Client Error HandlingThis section explains how to handle errors occuring in the client instance or as a result of server commands
 Client/Server ConnectivityThis section explains how to connect to a server and how the client should transmit voice and video data
 Client/Server CommandsThis section contains the list of commands which can be issued by the client instance to the server
 Audio and Video TransmissionThis section explains how to transmit audio and video to users in a channel
 Server AdministrationThis section explains how to configure a server and setup user accounts
 Channel PropertiesThis section explains the concept of channels where users can interact
 User PropertiesThis section explains users interact and how to configure user settings
 Windows HotkeysThis section explains how to setup hot-keys on Windows
 Windows MixerThis section explains how to control the Windows mixer
 Windows FirewallThis section explains how to configure the Windows firewall available in Windows XP SP2 and later
 TeamTalk Server APIInstantiate and run a TeamTalk server
 Server Request CallbacksHandle user requests to the server
 Server Notification CallbacksNotification events for server changes
